creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 04:57:57 2012
New Revision: 302052
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302052

Log:
  - Update to 0.16.1
  
  PR:		170145
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/devel/piklab/Makefile
  head/devel/piklab/distinfo
  head/devel/piklab/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/piklab/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/piklab/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 04:57:54 2012	(r302051)
+++ head/devel/piklab/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 04:57:57 2012	(r302052)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	piklab
-PORTVERSION=	0.16.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.16.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -16,16 +16,30 @@ COMMENT=	KDE IDE for microcontroller dev
 LICENSE=	GPLv2 # (or later)
 LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	KDE4
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=KDE4
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_QT4=	corelib gui qt3support qtestlib xml \
 		moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
-USE_KDE4=	automoc4 kdehier kdelibs kdeprefix sharedmime
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
 USE_CMAKE=	yes
-INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		piklab-hex.1 piklab-prog.1 piklab.1x
+MAN1=		piklab-hex.1 piklab-prog.1
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MKDE4}
+USE_KDE4=	automoc4 kdehier kdelibs kdeprefix sharedmime
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+MAN1+=		piklab.1x
+PLIST_SUB+=	KDE4=""
+.else
+CMAKE_ARGS+=	-DQT_ONLY:BOOL=ON \
+		-DLOCALE_INSTALL_DIR:STRING="${PREFIX}/share/locale"
+PLIST_SUB+=	KDE4="@comment "
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
@@ -39,11 +53,16 @@ LIB_DEPENDS+=	usb:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libu
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
-		'/install/s|^|#|' ${WRKSRC}/CMakeLists.txt
+		'/man/s|^|#| ; \
+		 /install/s|^|#|' ${WRKSRC}/CMakeLists.txt
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		'/CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE/s|^|#| ; \
 		 /KDE4/s|INCLUDE_DIRS|INCLUDES|' ${WRKSRC}/cmake/Piklab.cmake
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
-		'/install/s|share/man|man|' ${WRKSRC}/man/CMakeLists.txt
+
+post-install:
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/piklab-*.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MKDE4}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/piklab.1x ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/piklab/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 04:57:54 2012	(r302051)
+++ head/devel/piklab/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 04:57:57 2012	(r302052)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (piklab-0.16.0.tar.bz2) = f79d29e795f158a388d07fe1fe23ef912ea77ba74428efd1bcdd23e2c3ded788
-SIZE (piklab-0.16.0.tar.bz2) = 931968
+SHA256 (piklab-0.16.1.tar.bz2) = 80db24022de47a7377412912b1fd186d6ad08fafa042bed17b49ada2de56004d
+SIZE (piklab-0.16.1.tar.bz2) = 972681

-@unexec %%LOCALBASE%%/bin/update-mime-database %D/share/mime > /dev/null || /usr/bin/true
